ddls:
CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "ident" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each airport or heliport */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of airport or heliport (e.g., heliport, small_airport) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the airport or heliport */,
  "latitude_deg" REAL /* Latitude of the airport or heliport in degrees */,
  "longitude_deg" REAL /* Longitude of the airport or heliport in degrees */,
  "elevation_ft" INTEGER /* Elevation of the airport or heliport in feet */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the airport or heliport is located */,
  "iso_country" TEXT /* ISO code for the country where the airport or heliport is located */,
  "iso_region" TEXT /* ISO code for the region where the airport or heliport is located */,
  "municipality" TEXT /* Municipality where the airport or heliport is located */,
  "gps_code" TEXT /* GPS code for the airport or heliport */,
  "iata_code" TEXT /* IATA code for the airport or heliport */,
  "local_code" TEXT /* Local code for the airport or heliport */,
  "geom" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates of the airport or heliport */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the airport or heliport */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the airport or heliport */,
  "fax_number" TEXT /* Fax number of the airport or heliport */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the airport or heliport */,
  "has_control_tower" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the airport or heliport has a control tower */,
  "has_customs" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the airport or heliport has customs facilities */,
  "has_immigration" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the airport or heliport has immigration facilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ident"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_airports_municipality FOREIGN KEY ("municipality") REFERENCES municipalities ("name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_airports_iso_region FOREIGN KEY ("iso_region") REFERENCES regions ("iso_region"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_airports_iso_country FOREIGN KEY ("iso_country") REFERENCES countries ("iso_country")
)

CREATE TABLE "airport_codes" (
  "airport_ident" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the ident column in the airports table */,
  "code_type" TEXT /* Type of code (e.g., IATA, GPS, local) */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_ident", "code_type")
)

CREATE TABLE "airport_images" (
  "airport_ident" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the ident column in the airports table */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_ident", "image_url")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "iso_country" TEXT /* ISO code for the country */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("iso_country")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "iso_region" TEXT /* ISO code for the region */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "iso_country" TEXT /* ISO code for the country where the region is located */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country where the region is located */,
  "region_type" TEXT /* Type of region (e.g., state, province, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("iso_region"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_iso_country FOREIGN KEY ("iso_country") REFERENCES countries ("iso_country")
)

CREATE TABLE "municipalities" (
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the municipality */,
  "iso_region" TEXT /* ISO code for the region where the municipality is located */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region where the municipality is located */,
  "municipality_type" TEXT /* Type of municipality (e.g., city, town, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("name", "iso_region")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("username")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "username" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the username column in the users table */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("username", "permission")
)
